title: Huawei SFP-GE-LX10-eKit, SFP optical module, Single-Mode, 10km, 1G, LC
category: Huawei / Optical networks / SFP optical modules / SFP
description: Huawei SFP-GE-LX10-eKit is a single-mode SFP module with a maximum throughput of 1Gbps , 1310nm wavelength and two LC connectors for connection up to a distance of 10km . The module has built-in digital diagnostic functions (DDMI) including monitoring of optical power, voltage, temperature or other key parameters
